/usr/bin/c++ -rdynamic CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ball_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/game_object.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/game_level.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/sprite_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/particle_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/post_processor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/power_up.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/text_renderer.cpp.o -o main  /usr/local/lib/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenal.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfreetype.so -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl
